para.b: When to use IDapperRepository vs IAdoRepository:

item.description: IDapperRepository: Simple CRUD, quick queries, anonymous type parameters, automatic object mapping
IAdoRepository: Complex scenarios, bulk operations, DataSet results, streaming, full control

member.summary: Commits the transaction asynchronously, persisting all changes made within the transaction.

member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous commit operation.

member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous rollback operation.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the transaction has been completed (either committed or rolled back).

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Configuration.PaginationMetadataOptions.IncludeStoredProcedureName
member.summary: Include stored procedure names in metadata. ⚠️ Security: Only enable in development/staging environments. Default: false (secure by default)

member.summary: Include performance metrics (query duration, count duration). Generally safe to expose, useful for monitoring. Default: true

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Configuration.PaginationMetadataOptions.IncludeFilterInfo
member.summary: Include filter and search information. Generally safe, helps clients understand the results. Default: true

member.summary: Include sorting information. Generally safe, helps clients understand the results. Default: true

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Configuration.PaginationMetadataOptions.IncludeAppliedFilters

member.name: T:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType
member.summary: Classifies the nature of a domain error and drives HTTP status code mapping. Values are grouped into client errors (4xx) and server errors (5xx).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.Validation
member.summary: 422 – Business rule or field-level validation failed.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.BadRequest
member.summary: 400 – Malformed request syntax or invalid parameters.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.NotFound
member.summary: 404 – Requested resource does not exist.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.Conflict
member.summary: 409 – State conflict (duplicate key, optimistic-concurrency, etc.).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.Unauthorized
member.summary: 401 – Request requires authentication.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.Forbidden
member.summary: 403 – Caller is authenticated but not authorised.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.MethodNotAllowed
member.summary: 405 – HTTP method not allowed on this endpoint.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.NotAcceptable
member.summary: 406 – Client's Accept header cannot be satisfied.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.PayloadTooLarge
member.summary: 413 – Request payload exceeds the allowed size limit.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.UriTooLong
member.summary: 414 – Request URI is too long.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.UnsupportedMediaType
member.summary: 415 – Content-Type is not supported by this endpoint.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.RangeNotSatisfiable
member.summary: 416 – Requested byte range is not satisfiable.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.ExpectationFailed
member.summary: 417 – Expect header cannot be met.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.PreconditionFailed
member.summary: 412 – Conditional request precondition failed.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.PreconditionRequired
member.summary: 428 – Request must be conditional (precondition required).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.RequestHeadersTooLarge
member.summary: 431 – One or more request header fields are too large.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.UnavailableForLegal
member.summary: 451 – Resource unavailable for legal reasons.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.RateLimited
member.summary: 429 – Client has sent too many requests in a given time window.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.Internal
member.summary: 500 – An unexpected server-side error occurred.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.NotImplemented
member.summary: 501 – Feature or operation is not yet implemented.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.External
member.summary: 502 – An upstream/external service returned an invalid response.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.ServiceUnavailable
member.summary: 503 – Service is temporarily unavailable (maintenance, overload).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.Timeout
member.summary: 504 – An upstream service timed out (gateway timeout).

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.RequestTimeout
member.summary: 408 – The client request timed out before the server could respond.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.HttpVersionNotSupported
member.summary: 505 – HTTP version used in the request is not supported.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.InsufficientStorage
member.summary: 507 – Server is out of storage for the operation.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Domain.Enums.ErrorType.LoopDetected
member.summary: 508 – Infinite loop detected while processing the request.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse
member.summary: Represents a standardised response from a stored procedure. A Code of "0" indicates success; any other value is treated as an error.
member.remarks: For new stored procedures prefer the generic which gives full type safety and IntelliSense on the result payload. Use SpResponse<dynamic> when the shape is not known at compile time.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse.Code
member.summary: Result code returned by the stored procedure. "0" means success.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse.Result
member.summary: Primary result payload returned by the stored procedure.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse.Payload
member.summary: Deprecated secondary payload. Prefer for all new stored procedures. Retained for backward compatibility with existing procedures that still populate Payload.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse.Message
member.summary: Human-readable message returned by the stored procedure.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse.IsSuccess
member.summary: Returns true when the stored procedure signals success. Accepts "0" (standard) and "1" (legacy) as success codes.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse`1
member.summary: Strongly-typed stored procedure response.
member.typeparam: The type of the result payload. Use a concrete DTO for full compile-time safety, or pass dynamic when the shape is not known at compile time.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse`1.Code
member.summary: Result code returned by the stored procedure. "0" means success.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse`1.Result
member.summary: Typed result payload returned by the stored procedure.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse`1.Message
member.summary: Human-readable message returned by the stored procedure.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Responses.SpResponse`1.IsSuccess
member.summary: Returns true when is "0" (success). New stored procedures should always return "0" — legacy "1" is not accepted here.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.FilterRequestExtensions.GetFilterValue``1(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,System.String,``0)
member.summary:
Retrieves a filter value by key and converts it to .
Conversion priority:
Direct cast — fastest path when the stored value is already the right type.
— handles all types (int, bool, decimal, DateTime, …) and values stored as strings (query-string origin).
— handles enums, Guid, and other types with registered converters.
Nullable value types (e.g. int?, bool?) are supported: the underlying type is extracted automatically so GetFilterValue<int?>("companyId") works as expected.
member.typeparam: Target type, including nullable value types.
member.param: Returned when the key is absent, null, or conversion fails.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.FilterRequestExtensions.TryGetFilterValue``1(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,System.String,``0@)
member.summary: Tries to retrieve and convert a filter value by key. Returns true when the key exists and the value converts successfully to ; false when the key is absent or conversion fails.
member.typeparam: Target type, including nullable value types.
member.param: The converted value when this method returns true; otherwise default.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions
member.summary: JSON serialization helpers built on top of . The three *Options fields are static readonly so that can cache its internal type metadata across calls — recreating options on every access discards that cache.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.DefaultOptions
member.summary: Default options: camelCase, null-ignoring, comment-tolerant, enum-as-string. Suitable for the vast majority of API scenarios.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.PrettyOptions
member.summary: Pretty-print options: same as with WriteIndented = true. Useful for logging or developer-facing output.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.StrictOptions
member.summary: Strict options: case-sensitive, no trailing commas, no comments, never-ignore-null, strict number handling. Suitable for security-sensitive deserialization.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.DeserializeOptimized``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes JSON string to the specified type using optimized options.
member.typeparam: The target type to deserialize to.
member.exception: Thrown when JSON string is null or empty.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.DeserializeSafe``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Deserializes JSON string to the specified type with fallback value on failure.
member.typeparam: The target type to deserialize to.
member.param: The fallback value to return if deserialization fails.
member.returns: The deserialized object or fallback value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.SerializeOptimized``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Serializes object to JSON string using optimized options.
member.typeparam: The type of object to serialize.
member.param: Whether to format the JSON with indentation.
member.returns: The JSON string representation of the object.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.SerializeWithCamelCaseKeys(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Serializes a dictionary to JSON string, converting all keys to camelCase. Useful for ensuring consistent JSON property naming when working with dynamic dictionaries.
member.param: Whether to format the JSON with indentation.
member.returns: The JSON string representation with camelCase keys.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Core.Extensions.JsonExtensions.CloneDeep``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates a deep clone of an object via JSON serialization and deserialization.
member.typeparam: The type of object to clone.
member.returns: A deep clone of the object.

member.summary: Strips all characters that are not alphanumeric, spaces, underscores, or hyphens.

member.summary: Validates an IP address string and returns it if valid; otherwise returns "0.0.0.0". Handles forwarded-for headers that may be prefixed with "::ffff:" (IPv4-mapped IPv6).

member.summary: Returns DBNull.Value if is null; otherwise returns .

member.summary: Returns true if the is null or contains no rows.

member.summary: Returns true if the is null or contains no tables (with rows). When is true, tables with zero rows are removed first.
